data.title: TikTok Parent Fires Intern For 'Maliciously Interfering' With AI Training, Denies $10M Damage Claims Amid Social Media Outcry
data.description: Chinese tech giant ByteDance has dismissed an intern for allegedly disrupting the training of one of its artificial intelligence models.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Vitalik Buterin Says 'Baptisms Of Fire' In Cryptocurrency Will Catalyze Growth For Bitcoin And Other Digital Assets
data.description: In a recent conference held in Singapore, Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of the Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) blockchain, expressed his positive outlook on the future of cryptocurrencies, despite recent industry challenges.

data.title: Tesla, Intel Reject Allegations Of Illegal Mapping Activities In China Amid Spying Claims By Beijing
data.description: In the mid of allegations of illegal mapping activities in China, Tesla Inc. and Intel Corp have firmly denied any involvement.

data.title: American Express To Become Sole Owner Of Swisscard As UBS Sells Its 50% Stake
data.description: This sale is part of UBS's broader strategy to streamline its operations after the emergency takeover of Credit Suisse.

data.title: Ryan Detrick Predicts Bullish Trends For S&P 500: Historical Data Suggests Significant Gains
data.description: Ryan Detrick, Chief Market Strategist at Carson Group, recently highlighted positive trends for the S&P 500, noting that the index has risen in 10 of the last 11 months.
